titleStmt.title: SII 17.761: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 761. (A.R. No. 704 of 1904.) NEḌUṄGUṄAM, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Rāmachandraperumāḷ temple.
The details of date, viz. Śaka 1466, Krōdhin, Makara śu. 12, Thursday, Rōhiṇī, correspond to 1544 A.D., December 25, Thursday, f.d.n. ·07.

This inscription records that the village Teṉṉāṟampaṭṭu alias Rāmachandrapur ram, which had been granted as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam by Mallappa-nāyaka of Vēppanpaṭṭu was reendowed for Sarvādhyayana by the authorities of the Rāmachandra-perumāḷ temple at Neḍuṅguṉṟam and Mallappa-nāyaka was to maintain 12 Śrīvaishṇavas taking part in the tiruvadhyayana••

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvirapratāpa śrīvira Accuta deva mahārāyar pṛdhivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śubhamastu svastiśrī . śakā bdam 1000 4 100 6 10 6ṉ melcellāniṉṟa kuṟoti varuṣattu māka nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu ddhādaśiyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa rokaṇi nakṣatrattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭa lattu paṭaiviṭṭu rācciyattu kuḻaippalūr nāṭṭu murukumaṅkalappaṟṟu palkuṉṟak koṭ ṭattu meṟkuṉṟa nāṭṭil neṭuṅkuṉṟattu śrīrāmacantirap perumāḷukku vep panpaṭṭu mallappa nāyakkar Uḷḷiṭṭār tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭa teṉṉāṟampaṭṭukku pratināmamāṉa rāmacantiṟapurattai caturtagotrattumallappa nāyakkaruḷḷiṭṭārumrāmacan tiṟaperumāḷ koyil tāṉattārum rāmacantirap perumāḷ tiruṉāḷ tiruvatti yeṉam celuttuk koḷ kkumpaṭikku śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku caruvattiyeṉa taṟma māka viṭṭu niccayitta bhāgam samsthai 10 2 yinta bhāgam 10 2m bhṛgusagotrattu Ā�stamba sūtrattu yajuḥśākhāddhyāyiyānavaṉṟiyūr paravasattutirumalaiyyaṅkār mutalāṉa 10 2
śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum rāmacandra perumāḷ kaiyyile sahiraṇyodaka dhārāpūrvamāka Udakam paṇṇik kuṭutto rāmacandrapura ṭṭār Eppeṟpaṭṭa sakala samutāya prāptiyum putrapautrapāramparaiyāka Ācandrārkasthāyiyāka dānādhivinimaya vikrayaṅ kaḷukkum yogyamākumpaṭi koḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷākavum svadattāt dvigu ṇam puṇyam paradattānupālanam . paradattāpahāreṇa svadattanniṣphalam bhavet .* svadattāmparadattām vā yohareta vasundharām ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṇḍāyate kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 17.761 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
